abilities.name: volt-absorb
abilities.shortEffect: Absorbs Electric moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
abilities.effect: Whenever an Electric-type move hits this Pokémon, it heals for 1/4 of its maximum HP, negating any other effect on it. This ability will not take effect if this Pokémon is Ground-type and thus immune to Electric moves. Electric moves will ignore this Pokémon's Substitute. This effect includes non-damaging moves, i.e. Thunder Wave.
abilities.flavorText: If hit by an Electric-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.

abilities.name: illuminate
abilities.effect: Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is doubled. This ability has no effect in battle.
abilities.flavorText: By illuminating its surroundings, the Pokémon prevents its accuracy from being lowered.

abilities.name: water-absorb
abilities.shortEffect: Absorbs Water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
abilities.effect: Whenever a Water-type move hits this Pokémon, it heals for 1/4 of its maximum HP, negating any other effect on it. Water moves will ignore this Pokémon's Substitute.
abilities.flavorText: If hit by a Water-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.
